case_title: DZUL, TOMAS VS CANCHE, JACINTO NOH

docket_entries.description: FORM FOR PETSA UTL, FLOR SENT A NEW FORM TO BE ACCOMPLISHED 9/22/06.
SPANISH INTERPRETER REQUESTED BY PLAINTIFF TOMAS DZUL. REQUEST PLACED WITH INTERPRETER COORDINATOR AT HOJ.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CANCHE, JACINTO NOH
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DZUL, TOMAS PETITION MAILED ON SEP 01, 2006
ORDER ON APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DZUL, TOMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CANCHE, JACINTO NOH $5,400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,400.00, DEFENDANT SHALL SATISFY JUDGMENT IN PAYMENTS, AS FOLLOWS: 1ST PAYMENT OF $400 DUE ON OR BEFORE JULY 30TH, 2006. THEREAFTER PAYMENTS OF $800 PER MONTH COMMENCING AUGUST 30, 2006, THEN ON THE 30TH OF EACH SUCCEEDING MONTH UNTIL PAID IN FULL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS OF PAYMENT OF JUDGEMENT SUBMITTED TO COURT FOR SIGNATURE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DZUL, TOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT CANCHE, JACINTO NOH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DZUL, TOMAS
COPIES OF ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS SENT TO PARTIES.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,119.96 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT CANCHE, JACINTO NOH
